description: Transform points. The geometric transformation may be a rotation, move (translation), or scaling, or any combination of the three. If combined, the operations are performed in the order: scale rotate translate . The scale and rotate operations are always performed with respect to origin . All points are transformed if < range > is not supplied.

keywords.name: merge-tolerance
keywords.description: Set the merge tolerance. When supplied, this will be used as a tolerance for merging points.

keywords.name: origin
keywords.description: Set the origin (point center) of the transformation v2 (2D vector coordinates).

keywords.name: rotate
keywords.description: Set an angle of rotation f in degrees.

keywords.name: scale
keywords.description: Scale the points; f1 = scale factor along the \(x\) coordinate, f2 = scale factor along \(y\) coordinate.

keywords.name: translate
keywords.description: Translate points. Points are moved by v2 (2D vector coordinates).

keywords.name: control-point
keywords.description: Move/freeze control points. When true (the default), control points are moved when the points they are associated with are moved. Control points will be “frozen” when false .
